description: Run on DuckLake database as storage with ducklake_default_version set to 1.0.

skip_tests.reason: Parquet is statically loaded in this config, test requires missing parquet
This test exercises the ducklake_version feature directly and assumes no global default is set
View column comments (ducklake_view_column_tag) were added in 1.1-dev1 and are not available when ducklake_default_version is pinned to 1.0
